title: Allow formulas to look vertically and horizontally
excerpt: Allow a formula to look for values in a column, not just on the row. For example, I want to do a count if that counts all values in a column that match the cell in the current row.

posts.author: mweekend (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow a formula to look for values in a column, not just on the row. For example, I want to do a count if that counts all values in a column that match the cell in the current row.
